reviews.comment:
Buena atención,  un poco demorados , solo dos playeros y filas de varios autos tardamos unos 20.minutos en poder cargar, no ofrecieron limpiar los vidrios,  aceptan tarjetas de crédito

(Translated by Google)
Good service, a little slow, only two attendants and several cars in line, it took us about 20 minutes to fill up. They didn't offer to clean the windows, but they accept credit cards.
